docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-25-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 41 TEHAMA L.P.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: CT CORP] FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANG, JIAMING AS TO DEFENDANT 41 TEHAMA L.P.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SHANG, JIAMING AS TO DEFENDANT 41 TEHAMA L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-21-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JIAMING SHANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 41 TEHAMA L.P. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SASHA BERMUDEZ, ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF INFORMS COURT THAT PARTIES HAVE CAME TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OUTSIDE COURT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTING A CONTINUANCE FOR 1 MONTH. PLAINTIFF TO FILE DISMISSAL TO THE COURT BEFORE THE NEXT COURT DATE OF FEB-21-2023 IF SETTLED BY NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-21-2023 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
